summary: OpenNori package bin now points to dist/bin/opennori.js, the built CLI can run doctor and read package-root skills/schemas/protocol assets through a shared package-root resolver, and tests cover the built dist bin export path.
reviewability: Run npm run check and the dist doctor command, then inspect package.json bin, src/package-root.js, and the built-dist regression test.
limitations: The source code is still mostly JavaScript with allowJs; this slice only moves the publish/runtime entry toward built output and keeps the later citty command-module migration separate.
